case_title: BOGGIANO, DARROW DBA CITY SITES VS NEILLAND, SIOBHAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOGGIANO, DARROW DBA CITY SITES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEILLAND, SIOBHAN $925.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $945.00, DEFENDANT'S NAME CORRECTED TO NEILLAND, SIOBAHN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT NEILLAND, SIOBHAN HEARING SET FOR DEC-30-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOGGIANO, DARROW DBA CITY SITES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEILLAND, SIOBHAN $925.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $945.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLTF RE: OBJECTION TO MOVAC FILED
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NEILLAND, SIOBHAN AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BOGGIANO, DARROW DBA CITY SITES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NEILLAND, SIOBHAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $925.00 FILED BY BOGGIANO, DARROW DBA CITY SITES AS TO DEFENDANT NEILLAND, SIOBHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT NEILLAND, SIOBHAN HEARING SET FOR MAY-24-1999 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEILLAND, SIOBHAN
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-30-1998, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-29-1998, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-09-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NEILLAND, SIOBHAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BOGGIANO, DARROW DBA CITY SITES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAY-24-1999, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT NEILLAND, SIOBHAN
